jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - IndiGrid - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? IndiGrid in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
